## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test addition / update

## Testing

- [ ] All existing unit tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] New unit tests added for new functionality
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] ESLint passes with no warnings
- [ ] Tested on physical Android device
- [ ] Tested on physical iOS device (if applicable)

## Benchmark Impact

If this PR affects performance, include before/after numbers:

| Metric | Before | After |

| Total pipeline (p95) | ms | ms |
| Model size | MB | MB |

## Security Considerations

- [ ] No new data is stored unencrypted
- [ ] No biometric images are persisted to disk
- [ ] No sensitive data in logs
- [ ] Encryption parameters unchanged (or justified if changed)
